full_text:
Wang Guo 王國
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Guo (王國). Ally of Ma Teng and Han Sui. Made leader of their rebellion. Wang Guo was affiliated with Qiang. Wang Guo lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
